{{< include /_macros.qmd >}}

# Assembling the Transformer {#sec-the-transformer}

::: {.callout-note appearance="simple"}
## In this chapter
<!-- Snap the pieces from Part III together into a full decoder-only model,
     end to end, and count its parameters and FLOPs. -->
:::

**Learning objectives.**

<!-- TODO -->
- [ ]
- [ ]

## The block

<!-- attention + MLP, each wrapped in norm and residual. The canonical
     pre-norm decoder block. -->

## The full model

<!-- Embedding -> N blocks -> final norm -> LM head. Weight tying revisited.
     Reference: `src/thebook/model.py`. -->

## Parameter and FLOP budget

<!-- Close-form counts as a function of d_model, n_layer, n_head, vocab;
     the ~6ND rule of thumb. Sets up scaling laws (@sec-scaling-laws). -->

## A forward and backward pass

<!-- Trace shapes through the whole model once, carefully. -->

## Exercises {.unnumbered}

<!-- TODO: assemble GPT from the stubs; verify parameter count. -->

## Further reading {.unnumbered}
